allow: PowerShell(if \($env:GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN\) { "Token is set \(length: $\($env:GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.Length\)\)" } else { "Token is NOT set" })

PowerShell([System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN", "User"\) | ForEach-Object { if \($_\) { "Stored in User env vars" } else { "Not in User env vars" } }; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN", "Machine"\) | ForEach-Object { if \($_\) { "Stored in Machine env vars" } else { "Not in Machine env vars" } })
